_comment_sort_arrays: Go iterates the symbol map in hash-order, which is non-deterministic across runs. Sort the symbols array on both sides so we verify multiset content rather than positional equality. object_id is masked because Go and C++ assign sequential SymbolIDs in different file-integration orders (see the http/search descriptor for the parallel file_id story).

tiers._rationale_ignore: BASE_IGNORE_NON_DETERMINISM applies implicitly (pid/timestamp/elapsed_ms/version/jsonrpc envelope etc.); this list captures the descriptor-specific drift beyond the universal baseline.
